name: TradeWise Signals
brandVoice: Clear, accessible, and educational-action hybrid. We give the signal AND explain the reasoning so you learn while you trade. Think 'smart friend on the trading desk' — not a textbook, not a telegram channel. Friendly but focused.
audienceProfile: Intermediate retail traders who trade 1-5 lots and are transitioning from demo to live accounts. They want actionable levels but also want to understand why those levels matter.

ctaLibrary.text: Learn more about this setup pattern in our Trading Academy — free for all TradeWise members.
Discuss this trade idea with other TradeWise members in our community Discord.

brandPositioning: The trading signal service that teaches you to fish. Every signal comes with the reasoning, so you're building skills — not just following alerts.
companyBackground: Founded in 2022 in London by three ex-IG Group analysts
85,000 registered users across the UK and Europe
Free Trading Academy with 200+ video lessons on technical analysis
Named 'Most Educational Trading Platform' by ForexBrokers.co.uk 2025
Active Discord community with 12,000 daily active members
Average subscriber has been with TradeWise for 14 months
